auth.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.appleError: Sign in with Apple couldn't complete. Please try again.
auth.iosOnly: PALIMPS only supports signing in with Apple on iOS devices.
auth.logoutError: An error occurred while signing out.

home.title: My Books
home.deleteMessage: This will delete the book and all its moments. This action cannot be undone.
home.archiveHint: Hides this book from your library

bookDetail.title: Book
bookDetail.momentProcessingHint: Check back in a few seconds
bookDetail.addFirstMomentHint: Photograph a page of this book to capture the first moment

addBook.title: New Book
addBook.author: Author
addBook.selectPhotoSource: Where would you like to choose the cover photo from?
addBook.createError: An error occurred while adding the book.
addBook.galleryPermission: Gallery access permission is required to select a photo.
addBook.cameraPermission: Camera access permission is required to take a photo.
addBook.coverUploadFailedMessage: Your book was saved, but the cover photo couldn't be uploaded. You can add a cover later from the book page.
addBook.autoFilledFromCover: Filled from cover — edit if needed

addMoment.title: New Moment
addMoment.selectPhotoSource: Where would you like to choose the page photo from?
addMoment.pagePhotoDesc: Photograph the entire page, whether underlined or not
addMoment.ocrInfo: After saving the photo, the text on the page will be automatically extracted.
addMoment.createError: An error occurred while adding the moment.
addMoment.photoRequired: Please take or select a page photo.
addMoment.ocrFirst: Save the photo first. You can generate an AI note after the OCR text is extracted.
addMoment.galleryPermission: Gallery access permission is required to select a photo.
addMoment.cameraPermission: Camera access permission is required to take a photo.
addMoment.ocrFailedMessage: Your moment was saved, but we couldn't extract the text from the page. You can add a note manually later.

momentDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this moment? This action cannot be undone.

tagDetail.empty: No moments under this theme yet.

profile.title: Profile
profile.languageChangeError: Couldn't change the language. Please try again.
profile.premiumComingSoonDesc: AI features will be available very soon
profile.deleteAccountHint: Permanently deletes all of your data
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: All your books, reading moments, and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountError: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
profile.nameSaveError: Couldn't save your name. Please try again.
profile.viewLibraryHint: Opens your books and reading moments
profile.dangerZoneDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your books, reading moments, and data will be permanently deleted.

subscription.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? Premium features stay active until end of period.
subscription.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled. Premium features remain until end of period.

premium.title: PALIMPS Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock the full power of your reading memory
premium.noCreditSystem: No credit system – all features unlimited
premium.noPackages: No packages available. Please try again later.
premium.terms: Subscription can be cancelled anytime from App Store settings. Auto-renews.
premium.cancellationInfo: You can cancel your subscription at any time in iPhone Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. If not cancelled at least 24 hours before the period ends, the subscription automatically renews.
premium.activated: Your Premium membership is now active.
premium.purchaseError: An error occurred, please try again.
premium.restoredMessage: Your Premium membership has been restored.

feature1.title: AI Note Generation
feature1.desc: Automatically generate smart notes from your reading moments

feature2.title: AI Summary
feature2.desc: Generate comprehensive summaries of your books with AI

feature3.title: AI Thematic Analysis
feature3.desc: Group your reading moments thematically and discover connections

feature4.title: Advanced Search
feature4.desc: Search across all your books and notes with powerful filters

feature5.title: Reading Statistics
feature5.desc: Track your reading progress with detailed graphs and analytics

feature6.title: Export Options
feature6.desc: Export your notes as PDF or Markdown

feature8.title: Unlimited Storage
feature8.desc: Store all your reading moments and photos without limits

premiumGate.title: Premium Feature
premiumGate.description: {{feature}} is a premium feature. Upgrade to unlock AI-powered features and more.
premiumGate.premiumRequired: AI-powered note generation is a premium feature. Would you like to upgrade?

bookLimit.title: Your 5 active books are full
bookLimit.body: Free accounts keep 5 books active at a time. Archive a finished one to open a slot — or upgrade for unlimited.
bookLimit.archiveHint: Tip: swipe a book in your library to archive it

bookMonthlyLimit.title: Whoa — slow down a little
bookMonthlyLimit.body: You've added a lot of books this month. Try again in a bit; we're just smoothing things out on our side.

momentLimit.title: 10 moments captured in this book
momentLimit.body: Free accounts hold 10 moments per book. Delete one, or upgrade to keep going without limits.

momentSanityCap.title: This book is at capacity
momentSanityCap.body: You've captured a remarkable number of moments here. Try starting a new book for this reading session.

assistantQuota.title: You love Memory, huh?
assistantQuota.body: You've used all 10 free Memory questions. Upgrade to ask as many as you want — your reading data, your conversation.

usage.title: Free usage
usage.lifetimeNote: Memory questions are lifetime — no monthly reset.

chat.title: Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about your reading data
chat.errorMessage: Couldn't reach the assistant. Please try again.
chat.errorUnavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
chat.errorRateLimit: You've hit the hourly chat limit. Try again in an hour.
chat.premiumRequiredBody: The assistant is a premium feature. Upgrade to analyze your reading data and chat without limits.
chat.exampleIntro: You can ask questions about your reading data.
chat.example2: What topics did I take the most notes on?

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.dailyReminderDesc: Reminds you to read at your chosen time every day
notifications.streakAlertDesc: Notifies you if 22 hours pass without saving a moment
notifications.weeklySummaryDesc: Track your reading stats with a weekly digest
notifications.permissionMessage: Please allow notifications in Settings to enable this feature.
notifications.permissionBanner: Notification permission is needed. Tap here to request access.
notifications.dailyPushBody: You haven't saved a moment today. Your book is waiting.
notifications.weeklyPushBody: How many moments did you catch this week? Let's see.
notifications.streakPushTitle: Your streak is about to break
notifications.streakPushBody: You haven't saved a moment today. Keep your streak alive.

welcome.title: Welcome to PALIMPS
welcome.description: Save every page you read, every moment, in your digital memory. Build a deeper connection with your books.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Add a book, photograph a page, write your note. Our OCR automatically recognizes the text.

aiPowered.title: Power It with AI
aiPowered.description: With Premium, unlock unlimited AI-powered note generation, summaries, and thematic analysis.

crop.title: Crop Page
crop.hint: Drag the corners to frame only the page — anything outside is ignored by OCR.
crop.loadFailed: Couldn't load the image. Please take the photo again.

unhandled.title: Something went wrong
unhandled.subtitle: The issue was reported automatically. Want to try again?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Want to try again?
errors.chatSendFailed: Message couldn't be sent. Please try again.
errors.photoUploadFailed: Photo upload failed. Please try again.
errors.networkError: Couldn't reach the internet. Check Wi-Fi or cellular and try again.
errors.uploadTimeout: The upload took too long. Your connection may be slow — want to try again?
errors.uploadBadRequest: The photo wasn't accepted. Retake it and try again.
errors.serverError: Something's off on our side. Mind trying again in a moment?
errors.configError: There's a missing piece in the app's setup. Please let us know if this keeps happening.
errors.rateLimitOcr: You've hit today's photo limit. Please try again tomorrow.

common.updateFailed: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.
